title: × cuprocyparis ovensii
intro: × Cuprocyparis ovensii, also known as the Cupressus ovensii, is a hybrid coniferous plant that is a cross between Cupressus macrocarpa and Cupressus lusitanica. The medicinal properties of this plant are largely attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds such as cedrol and cedrene, and have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of × Cuprocyparis ovensii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of fungal infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's essential oils are often extracted through steam distillation and used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and traditional medicine.
